title: Bidding war erupts for world’s oldest bank as Italy’s Intesa gatecrashes BPM offer
summary_full: Intesa on Monday announced an unsolicited offer of $35.3 billion, hoping to usurp its rival and create Europe's second-biggest ​bank by market capitalization.
summary_public: Intesa on Monday announced an unsolicited offer of $35.3 billion, hoping to usurp its rival and create Europe's second-biggest ​bank by market capitalization.
